name: Auto-label incoming Gmail messages with AI
description: Fetches recent Gmail messages, uses Claude AI to classify each email into categories (work, personal, newsletter, urgent, spam), then applies labels via Gmail API. Adapted from n8n's auto-label Gmail with AI nodes workflow.

source.originalName: Auto-label incoming Gmail messages with AI nodes

gmailKey.description: Gmail connection key for reading and labeling emails

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID for labeling report

searchQuery.description: Gmail search query to find emails to label

maxEmails.description: Max number of emails to process

labels.default: work, personal, newsletter, urgent, promotions, receipts

code.source:
const messages = $.steps.fetchEmails.response.messages || [];
return { messageIds: messages.map(m => m.id).filter(Boolean).slice(0, 15) };

steps.name: Fetch email details for each message
Compile email summaries for AI classification
Build Slack Block Kit labeling report
